calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-17-2021 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-06-2021 Continued To Oct-06-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Court Approval And Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Pdx Aromatics Llc
Off Calendar Aug-16-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF CENTER FOR ENVIRONMENTAL HEALTH's Motion For Court Approval And Entry Of Consent Judgment As To PDX Aromatics LLC.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Center for Environmental Health's motion for court approval and entry of consent judgment as to PDX Aromatics LLC is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements under Health & Safety Code section 25249.7. The Court finds that the warning that is required by the settlement complies with Health & Safety Code sections 25249.5-25249.14; the award of attorney's fees is reasonable under California law; and the penalty amount is reasonable based on the criteria set forth in Health & Safety Code section 25249.7(b)(2).

Order signed. Separate judgment signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
